LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DESMOND AIGBUZA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT. THE COURT GRANTED MS. BATES-MOORE'S REQUEST AND VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 7, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. OPPOSITION PAPERS ARE DUE BY DECEMBER 22, 2015. REPLY PAPERS ARE DUE BY DECEMBER 30, 2015. AN ORDER REFLECTING THE CONTINUANCE AND BRIEFING SCHEDULE WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DESMOND AIGBUZA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473(D) AND 473.5 IS UNTIMELY. SEE TRACKMAN V. KENNEY (2010) 187 CAL.APP.4TH 175, 180. IN ADDITION, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND DEFENDANT TO BE CREDIBLE. DEFENDANT'S MOVING DECLARATION SUGGESTS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT HAVE A RELATIONSHIP WITH 537 JONES ST., BUT THE EVIDENCE IS TO THE CONTRARY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

calendar.matters:
Defendant Desmond Aigbuza'S Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Desmond Aigbuza's Motion To Vacate Judgment is denied. Plaintiff's request for relief under CCP 473(d) and 473.5 is untimely. See Trackman v. Kenney (2010) 187 Cal.App.4th 175, 180. In addition, the court does not find defendant to be credible. Defendant's moving declaration suggests that defendant did not have a relationship with 537 Jones St., but the evidence is to the contrary. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgement
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT DESMOND AIGBUZA'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is continued to January 19, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give the Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 7, 2016, at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgement
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Continued To Jan-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore telephone number 510-482-2158 specially appearing for Plaintiffs Counsel on behalf of the Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Ms. Bates-Moore presented oral argument and requested a 30-day continuance. The Court granted Ms. Bates-Moore's request and vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DESMOND AIGBUZA'S Motion To Vacate Judgement is continued to January 7, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Opposition papers are due by December 22, 2015. Reply papers are due by December 30, 2015. An order reflecting the continuance and briefing schedule was signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
